parties.name: LUDVIGSON, SHANNON 333 SANTA CLARA AVE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288
Petitioner Shannon Ludvigson (mother) was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Ayah Ebony Ludvigson.

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father Andrew Merchant was not present, but consented to the name change of the minor by way of notarized declaration, filed 02-23-12.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Ayah Ebony Merchant.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
